name: Sustained Ion-Particle Beam
customPrimary: Hits on hull or armor periodically arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage. Hits on shields have a chance to generate a shield-penetrating arc based on the target's hard flux level.

name: Heavy Sustained Ion-Particle Beam
customPrimary: Hits on hull or armor periodically arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage. Hits on shields have a chance to generate a shield-penetrating arc based on the target's hard flux level.

name: Sequenced Ion Artillery
customPrimary: Explodes on hit, creating random arcs to nearby ships that deal 25% of the original Energy and EMP damage to random weapons or engines. Hits each ship with up to 6 arcs, half of which can penetrate shields.

name: Ion-Particle Lance
customPrimary: Hits on hull or armor frequently arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage. Hits on shields have a high chance to generate a shield-penetrating arc based on the target's hard flux level.

customPrimary: Hits on hull or armor periodically arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage. Hits on shields have a chance to generate a shield-penetrating arc based on the target's hard flux level.
